final:
module RefModule(
                 output logic [7:0] q,
                 input logic [7:0]  d,
                 input logic        clk, rst_n
                 );always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)
     if (!rst_n) q <= '0;
     else        q <= d;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
